text: 1114 - وَ رَوَى مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ عَلِيٍّ اَلْحَلَبِيُّ عَنْهُ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ أَنَّهُ قَالَ: «لاَ تُصَلِّ خَلْفَ مَنْ يَشْهَدُ عَلَيْكَ بِالْكُفْرِ وَ لاَ خَلْفَ مَنْ شَهِدْتَ عَلَيْهِ بِالْكُفْرِ.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.1114 - Muhammad ibn Ali Al-Halabi narrated from him (as) that He said:
"Do not pray behind someone who declares you to be an unbeliever (kafir), and do not pray behind someone whom you have declared to be an unbeliever."
